title: Persuasive/Deceptive Visualization
description: Two opposing visualizations with rationale and ethics reflection.

title: Visualizing Price per Category
description: Which food category costs the most per calorie in a typical grocery store? This project explores and attempts to answer this question.

title: Amazon Review Sentiment as a Predictor of Economic Trends
description: This project investigates whether consumer sentiment expressed in Amazon product reviews can serve as an early indicator of broader economic trends.

title: Modeling How Moisture Affects Wildfire Spread
description: MATLAB cellular automaton simulation modeling wildfire propagation under varying moisture and drying conditions. Explores ignition probability, moisture inhibition, and fire-induced drying dynamics.
